title: User Login and Authentication
description: Verify regular user can successfully log in and access authenticated pages

steps.description: Navigate to sign-in page (/sign-in)
Wait for Clerk sign-in form to load (look for email input field)
Fill in email input field with user email from environment variable TEST_USER_EMAIL (required for user tests)
Fill in password input field with user password from environment variable TEST_USER_PASSWORD (required for user tests)
Click sign-in button or submit form
Verify successful login (redirected away from /sign-in page, user menu/profile visible)
Verify user is authenticated (profile avatar or user menu visible in header)

title: Homepage Access After Login
description: Verify homepage loads correctly for authenticated user

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify main sections are visible: Hero section, Live Events section, Featured Events section
Verify user profile avatar/menu is visible in header (indicating authenticated state)
Verify navigation menu is visible and functional

title: Profile Page Access
description: Verify user can access profile page and view personal details

steps.description: Navigate to profile page (/profile)
Verify profile page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify profile form is visible
Verify profile form fields are visible: First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Address fields
Verify existing profile data is displayed (if profile exists)
Verify Save button is visible

title: Profile Edit - Personal Information
description: Verify user can edit personal information fields in profile

steps.description: Navigate to profile page (/profile)
Wait for profile form to load
Locate First Name input field
Clear First Name field and enter new test value (e.g., 'TestFirstName')
Locate Last Name input field
Clear Last Name field and enter new test value (e.g., 'TestLastName')
Locate Phone input field
Clear Phone field and enter test phone number (e.g., '555-123-4567')
Verify form fields accept input and display entered values

title: Profile Edit - Address Information
description: Verify user can edit address information in profile

steps.description: Navigate to profile page (/profile)
Wait for profile form to load
Scroll to address section if needed
Locate Address Line 1 input field
Clear Address Line 1 field and enter test address (e.g., '123 Test Street')
Locate City input field
Clear City field and enter test city (e.g., 'Test City')
Locate State input field
Clear State field and enter test state (e.g., 'TS')
Locate Zip Code input field
Clear Zip Code field and enter test zip code (e.g., '12345')
Verify all address fields accept input and display entered values

title: Profile Save - Save Changes
description: Verify user can save profile changes successfully

steps.description: Navigate to profile page (/profile)
Wait for profile form to load
Make a small change to First Name field (e.g., add 'Updated' suffix)
Locate Save button
Click Save button
Wait for save operation to complete (look for success message or dialog)
Verify success message or confirmation dialog appears (e.g., 'Profile saved successfully')
Refresh page or navigate away and back to profile page
Verify saved changes persist (First Name field shows updated value)

title: Events Listing Page Access
description: Verify authenticated user can access events listing page

steps.description: Navigate to events listing page (/events)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify page title and header are visible
Verify events grid/list container is present
Verify search/filter functionality is visible (if present)
Verify user profile avatar/menu is visible in header

title: Event Details Page Access
description: Verify authenticated user can view event details

steps.description: Navigate to events listing page (/events)
Wait for event cards to load
Click on the first available event card (if events exist)
Verify event details page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify event title is visible
Verify event date and time information is displayed
Verify user profile avatar/menu is visible in header

title: Gallery Page Access
description: Verify authenticated user can access gallery page

steps.description: Navigate to gallery page (/gallery)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify gallery page title and header are visible
Verify gallery grid/container is present
Verify search/filter functionality is visible (if present)
Verify user profile avatar/menu is visible in header

title: Gallery Search and Filter
description: Verify authenticated user can search and filter gallery items

steps.description: Navigate to gallery page (/gallery)
Wait for gallery page to load
Locate search input field
Enter search term in search field (e.g., 'test')
Click search button or wait for search to execute
Verify search results update (gallery items filtered or message displayed)
Click clear/reset button to clear search
Verify gallery resets to show all items

title: About Page Access
description: Verify authenticated user can access about page via dropdown menu

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/)
Locate 'About' menu item in navigation
Hover over or click 'About' menu item to reveal dropdown
Wait for dropdown menu to appear
Click 'About Us' link from dropdown menu
Verify page scrolls to about section or about page loads
Verify about section content is visible

title: Contact Page Access
description: Verify authenticated user can access contact section

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/)
Locate 'Contact' menu item in navigation
Click 'Contact' menu item
Verify page scrolls to contact section or contact page loads
Verify contact form or contact information is visible

title: Polls Page Access
description: Verify authenticated user can access polls page

steps.description: Navigate to polls page (/polls)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify polls page title and header are visible
Verify polls list or container is present
Verify user profile avatar/menu is visible in header

title: Calendar Page Access
description: Verify authenticated user can access calendar page

steps.description: Navigate to calendar page (/calendar)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify calendar page title and header are visible
Verify calendar component or container is present
Verify user profile avatar/menu is visible in header

title: Pricing Page Access
description: Verify authenticated user can access pricing page

steps.description: Navigate to pricing page (/pricing)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify pricing page title and header are visible
Verify pricing plans or pricing information is visible
Verify user profile avatar/menu is visible in header

title: Navigation - Profile Link from Features Menu
description: Verify user can navigate to profile page from Features dropdown menu

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/)
Locate 'Features' menu item in navigation
Hover over or click 'Features' menu item to reveal dropdown
Wait for dropdown menu to appear
Click 'Profile' link from Features dropdown menu
Verify navigation to profile page (/profile) is successful
Verify profile form is visible

title: User Sign Out
description: Verify user can successfully sign out

steps.description: Ensure user is logged in (navigate to any authenticated page)
Locate user profile avatar/menu in header
Click on user profile avatar to open dropdown menu
Wait for dropdown menu to appear
Locate 'Sign Out' button or link in dropdown menu
Click 'Sign Out' button
Wait for sign-out process to complete
Verify user is signed out (redirected to homepage or sign-in page)
Verify user profile avatar/menu is no longer visible (replaced with Sign In button)
Navigate to profile page (/profile)
Verify profile page redirects to sign-in or shows unauthenticated state

title: Post-Logout Public Page Access
description: Verify public pages are still accessible after logout

steps.description: Ensure user is signed out (from previous test)
Navigate to homepage (/)
Verify homepage loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Navigate to events listing page (/events)
Verify events page loads without errors
Navigate to gallery page (/gallery)
Verify gallery page loads without errors
Verify Sign In button is visible in header (not profile avatar)

title: Re-Login After Logout
description: Verify user can log in again after signing out

steps.description: Ensure user is signed out
Navigate to sign-in page (/sign-in)
Wait for Clerk sign-in form to load
Fill in email input field with user email from environment variable TEST_USER_EMAIL
Fill in password input field with user password from environment variable TEST_USER_PASSWORD
Click sign-in button or submit form
Verify successful login (redirected away from /sign-in page)
Verify user profile avatar/menu is visible in header
Navigate to profile page (/profile)
Verify profile page loads and displays user information

title: Profile Page - Email Subscription Toggle
description: Verify user can toggle email subscription status in profile

steps.description: Navigate to profile page (/profile)
Wait for profile form to load
Scroll to email subscription section if needed
Locate email subscription checkbox or toggle
Verify email subscription checkbox/toggle is visible
Toggle email subscription checkbox (check if unchecked, uncheck if checked)
Click Save button
Wait for save operation to complete
Verify success message appears
